CustomField.description: Calculates elapsed time between now and last Event attendance (Business Days without National Day Off)
CustomField.formula: (5 * ( FLOOR( ( Today() - DATE( 1900, 1, 8) ) / 7 ) ) + MIN( 5, MOD( Today() - DATE( 1900, 1, 8), 7 ) ) ) - (5 * ( FLOOR( (DATEVALUE(Last_Event_attendance__c) - DATE( 1900, 1, 8) ) / 7 ) ) + MIN( 5, MOD( DATEVALUE(Last_Event_attendance__c) - DATE( 1900, 1, 8), 7 ) ) )
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Elapsed time (Days) since last attendance to an event (Business Days without National Day Off)
CustomField.label: Last Event attendance elapsed time
